title: French Floral Rice Bowl
description: A simple and flavorful bowl filled with crispy floral rice, savory broth, and a hint of freshness.

ingredients.name: Crisp vegetables
ingredients.notes: such as carrots, peas, or scallions

ingredients.name: Floral garnish
ingredients.notes: optional, such as chopped fresh herbs

instructions: Heat the broth in a medium saucepan over medium heat.
Add the rice to the saucepan and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and cover.
Simmer for 18-20 minutes or until the liquid has been absorbed.
Fluff the rice with a fork and stir in the crisp vegetables.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve the rice mixture in bowls and garnish with floral garnish, if desired.
